name: Copyright Ownership and Attribution
text: Unless expressly provided otherwise in this Agreement, all pre-existing intellectual property rights, including copyright, of each Party shall remain its exclusive property.

legal_basis.note: Moral rights — author's right to attribution and integrity

invalid_if: This clause is insufficient if the primary purpose of the agreement involves the creation and assignment of new intellectual property.
This clause does not provide for the transfer or licensing of intellectual property created under this agreement.
title: Copyright
dispute_hotspots: Moral rights under S.57 — author can object to distortion even after assignment
Attribution disputes — developer wants credit in published software
